commit_scope: Lift kernel-router source routes from BML-specific naming into a generic source-language object model, compile source-authored route classes into native Form recipe objects, and serve the production health route from the Rust kernel.

commands: cd /Users/ursmuff/.claude-worktrees/Coherence-Network/bml-support-overview-20260603 && git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main

cd /Users/ursmuff/.claude-worktrees/Coherence-Network/bml-support-overview-20260603/form && native prepared Go/Rust parity for kernel-http, source-language-route-class-template, form-bml-maintenance, and source-corpus-roundtrip
local_validation.notes: Native prepared Go/Rust parity passed: kernel-http go=66690 rust=66690, source-language-route-class-template go=525377 rust=525377, form-bml-maintenance go=77 rust=77, source-corpus-roundtrip go=1566 rust=1566. Rust cargo test passed with 39 tests. Live router smoke returned HTTP 200, body ok, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, and the server log showed the production source manifest compiled via form-stdlib into a Form recipe object with 24 native routes.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until the branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Production verification is pending until PR checks pass, the branch is merged, deployment completes, and public verification runs.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The kernel router can load a source-authored production manifest, lower a high-level generic source-language route class through form-stdlib into a native Form recipe object, and serve the selected route from the Rust kernel without a BML-specific proof harness.
test_flows: native prepared Go/Rust parity for kernel-http and source-language route-class template workloads
local form-kernel-rust serve against deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk and curl /health?probe=language

phase_gate.notes: Local native proof and local HTTP proof are complete; CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: language-model.fk defines generic language template, class, class member, route class, and route-data-ref cells instead of BML-specific route aliases.
source-compiler.fk lowers form.bml template/class source syntax into generic language-* Form calls.
production-routes.fk includes a source-language RouteCell template and HealthRoute class whose route object is consumed by the kernel router.
form-kernel-rust source manifest loading compiles section-authored manifests through form-stdlib and imports the returned Form recipe object into worker kernels.
The obsolete router-bml proof source and Python proof harness were removed; the live production manifest and Rust router serve path now carry the proof.
Local HTTP smoke observed the real native route response rather than mock route data.
